response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the VTuber performance of 'Idol' (YOASOBI) at the beginning of the video. 2. Identified the second performance as 'sweets parade' (Hanazawa Kana) around 02:53. 3. Used web search to confirm song titles, original artists, and lyrics for both songs. 4. Created scene boundaries and mapped performers and song metadata accordingly. 5. Formatted lyrics and metadata into the required JSON schema.
response.global_summary: A video showcasing two musical performances by various VTubers during Watame's birthday concert. The first performance is 'Idol' by YOASOBI, and the second is 'sweets parade' by Hanazawa Kana.

scenes.description: Performance of the song 'Idol'. The VTubers Watame, Fubuki, Flare, and Polka are dancing on stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
無敵の笑顔で荒らすメディア
知り合いその秘密ミステリアス
抜けてるとこさえ彼女のエリア
完璧で嘘つきな君は
天才的なアイドル様

今日何食べた？
好きな本は？
遊びに行くならどこに行くの？
何も食べてない
それは内緒
何を聴かれても
のらりくらり

そう淡々と
だけど燦々と
見えそうで見えない秘密は蜜の味
あれも無い無い無い
これも無い無い無い
好きなタイプは？
相手は？
さあ答えて

「誰かを好きになることなんて私分からなくてさ」
嘘か本当か知り得ない
そんな言葉にまた一人堕ちる
また好きにさせる

誰もが目を奪われていく
君は完璧で究極のアイドル
金輪際現れない
一番星の生まれ変わり
その笑顔で愛してるで
誰も彼も虜にしていく
その瞳がその言葉が
嘘でもそれは完全なアイ

はいはいあの子は特別です
我々はハナからおまけです
お星様の引き立て役Bです
全てがアノ子の御陰なわけない
洒落臭い
妬み嫉妬なんてないわけがない
これはネタじゃない
からこそ許せない
完璧じゃない君じゃ許せない
自分を許せない
誰よりも強い君以外は認めない

誰もが信じ崇めてる
まさに最強で無敵のアイドル
弱点なんて見当たらない
一番星を宿している
弱いとこなんて見せちゃダメダメ
知りたくないとこは見せずに
唯一無二じゃなくちゃイヤイヤ
それこそ本物のアイ

得意の笑顔で沸かすメディア
隠しきるこの秘密だけは
愛してるって嘘で積むキャリア
これこそ私なりの愛だ
流れる汗も綺麗なアクア
ルビーを隠したこの瞼
歌い踊り舞う私はマリア
そう嘘はとびきりの愛だ

誰かに愛されたことも
誰かのこと愛したこともない
そんな私の嘘がいつか本当になること
信じてる

いつかきっと全部手に入れる
私はそう欲張りなアイドル
等身大でみんなのこと
ちゃんと愛したいから
今日も嘘をつくの
この言葉がいつか本当になる日を願って
それでもまだ
君と君にだけは言えずにいたけど
やっと言えた
これは絶対嘘じゃない
愛してる
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
With a invincible smile, you destroy the media
The mystery you keep secret, is just the honey flavor of a secret that you can't see but is there
None, none, none of that, none, none, none of that either
Who's your type? Who's your partner? Come on, answer me

'I don't know what it means to fall in love with someone'
Whether it's a lie or the truth, nobody knows
Another person falls for those words, and you make them fall in love again
Everyone's eyes are being stolen by you
You are the perfect and ultimate idol
Someone like you will never appear again
The reincarnation of the brightest star
With that smile, with those 'I love yous'
You make everyone your captive
Those eyes, those words, even if they're lies, that is the perfect love

Yes, yes, that girl is special
We were just extras from the start
We're just the supporting cast B for the star
It's impossible that everything is thanks to her
It's annoying, how can there not be any jealousy or envy?
This isn't just a stunt, which is why I can't forgive it
I can't forgive you for not being perfect, I can't forgive myself
I won't acknowledge anyone but you, who is stronger than anyone else
Everyone believes in you and worships you
You are truly the strongest and invincible idol
There are no weaknesses to be found
You carry the brightest star within you
You mustn't show your weak spots
Without showing the parts that people don't want to see
You have to be one of a kind, no, no
That is the true love

With your signature smile, you excite the media
This is the only secret you keep hidden
You build your career on the lie of 'I love you'
This is my own kind of love
Even the sweat that flows is beautiful aqua
Those eyelids that hid the ruby
I, who sing and dance, am Maria
Yes, lies are the most special kind of love

Falling in love with someone, being loved by someone, I haven't done either
I believe that my lies will one day become the truth
Someday, I will surely get everything
I am such a greedy idol
Because I want to love everyone with my own body
I will continue to tell lies today too
Wishing for the day when these words become the truth
Even so, I still haven't been able to say it to you and to you
But I finally said it
This is absolutely not a lie
I love you
